channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Nobody's sure where the Federal Reserve is heading
item.description: Predicting what the Federal Reserve will do next has become an exercise in trying to game out the tactical instincts of a new chairman who isn't givin...

item.title: Cori Bush declines to commit to voting for Jeffries in 2027 if she regains her seat
item.description: Former Rep. Cori Bush (D-Mo.) told Axios she would not promise to support House Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries (D-N.Y.) in 2027.

item.title: GOP adopts Colombia as model for new election rules
item.description: Senate Republicans are pointing to Colombia as an example for stricter U.S. voting laws, using California as a counterpoint.

item.title: Three finalists emerge for FDA leadership role
item.description: White House aide Heidi Overton, oncologist Jeffrey Vacirca, and Pentagon health official Stephen Ferrara are candidates for FDA commissioner.
